title: Rhythm Copycat
description: A body-percussion pattern game where kids continue clap, stomp, pat, and animal beat sequences.
learningGoals: Recognize AB and ABC rhythm patterns
Turn screen patterns into real clap-and-stomp play
interactionModel: pattern-continue tap the next rhythm card to complete the beat
feedbackModel: Correct beats replay the full pattern and invite body movement; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.

modes.title: Animal Beats
modes.skill: auditory pattern recognition with animal sounds

credits: Emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
